parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the tremolo. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Intensity: Controls the depth of the tremolo, or the intensity of the volume fluctuations.
parameters-en.WavShape: Selects the wave shape of the tremolo. Classic tremolo is commonly a sine or triangle wave, but cool choppy sounds can be discovered with square or saw down waves.
parameters-en.DutyCycle: Alters the wave shape in differing ways. With Triangle, 50% is a normal triangle wave and extreme values warp the wave toward a saw down (0%) or saw up (100%) shape. With Sine, 50% is a normal sine wave and extreme values warp the wave toward a parabolic down (0%) or parabolic up (100%) shape. With Square, 50% is an even square wave, higher values lengthen the signal's on time, and lower values shorten the signal's on time. DutyCycle does not apply to Saw Up or Saw down.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
